subject: Two scrappy riders crewing an armored vehicle-mounted launcher firing a flaming rocket-tipped spear through a chaotic, smoke-choked battlefield
description: A rust-and-orange vehicle hull plated with riveted, X-marked sheet metal dominates the foreground. From a stubby barrel mounted to the hull, a long spear with a flaming rocket booster screams forward, leaving a streak of fire and a trailing fuse-rope. Two riders crew the rig: a wild-eyed figure in spiked armor and a red neckerchief, fanged mouth open in a feral shout, hair whipped back by motion; behind them a second figure in lighter garb steadies a long pole or lance. The sky is a churning wash of fire-orange, blood-red, and ash, with embers and debris streaking sideways. The vehicle's deck shows coiled rope, scattered shrapnel, and burn-scarred plating, evoking a junkyard war machine mid-charge.
foreground: armored vehicle prow with mounted rocket-spear launcher, two riders crewing the rig
background: smoke-choked battlefield sky with streaks of fire, scattered debris, and silhouetted wreckage
emotion: feral exhilaration, battle-frenzy, open-mouthed shout of aggression
